info.title: Life Command Center — Copilot Actions API
info.description: Copilot-facing action gateway for the Life Command Center. All actions route through a single gateway endpoint with typed schemas, tier-based confirmation, and full telemetry. LCC orchestrates; Copilot is a lens.

post.summary: Copilot Action Gateway — dispatch any registered action
post.description: Single entry point for all Copilot actions. Validates action_id against the registry, enforces tier-based confirmation, routes internally, and logs telemetry.

200.description: Action executed successfully or confirmation required

post.summary: Get today's prioritized daily briefing with strategic, important, and urgent items requiring attention.
List inbox items awaiting triage — flagged emails, SF tasks, system alerts.
Get my prioritized work queue — open action items sorted by due date and priority.
List high-priority business development contacts with recent activity or upcoming touchpoints.

contacts.description: Hot lead contacts with activity context

post.summary: Search canonical entities (contacts, organizations, assets) by name across all types.
Get the activity timeline for a specific entity — calls, emails, status changes, research.
Generate an AI-powered listing pursuit dossier with market analysis, comp data, and strategy recommendations.
Get full relationship context for an entity — communication history, deal involvement, touchpoint cadence.

context.description: Relationship context with history and recommendations

post.summary: Get pipeline intelligence — deal velocity, conversion rates, bottleneck analysis across domains.
Check health status of all sync connectors — Salesforce, Outlook, domain databases.
Get aggregate work counts — open actions, inbox items, overdue tasks, by domain and priority.
Generate a Microsoft Teams adaptive card for a work item, briefing, or notification.

data.description: Data payload to render into the card

post.summary: Retry a failed sync job.
List government domain research observations pending review or promotion.
List dialysis clinic-property link review queue for operator verification.
Generate an AI-powered daily prospecting call sheet — ranks top contacts by engagement score with call prep notes and talking points.

limit.description: Number of top contacts to include (default 10)

response.description: AI-generated call sheet with prep notes

post.summary: Draft a personalized outreach email for a business development contact. Provide contact_id (unified_id from GOV contacts DB) or contact_name.

contact_id.description: Contact unified_id from GOV contacts DB

contact_name.description: Contact name (used if contact_id not available)

intent.description: Purpose of the outreach (e.g., "reconnect", "listing pitch", "market update")

tone.description: Desired tone (default: professional, warm, and concise)

post.summary: Draft a seller update email for an active listing with marketing activity summary.
List all active email templates available for draft generation.
Get a specific email template by ID with its variable bindings and tone notes.
Generate an email draft from a template and context payload. Populates variables and renders the template.

context.description: Merged context payload with contact, property, listing data

strict.description: Fail if mandatory variables are missing

draft.description: Rendered draft with subject, body, variable resolution status

post.summary: Generate email drafts for multiple contacts using the same template. Used for listing blasts and market updates.

shared_context.description: Shared listing/property context merged with each contact

post.summary: Record that a template-generated draft was sent. Tracks edit distance and feeds the learning loop.
Get template performance analytics — open rates, reply rates, deal advancement, and edit distances. Use to evaluate which templates are working and which need revision.

template_id.description: Filter to a specific template ID (e.g., T-003). Omit for all templates.

avg_edit_distance_pct.description: 0=no edits, 100=completely rewritten. High values suggest template needs revision.

post.summary: Evaluate the health of all email templates — identifies templates with high edit rates (needs revision), underperformance against targets, and stale templates. Auto-flags templates for revision and generates suggestions.

template_id.description: Evaluate a specific template (e.g., T-001). Omit for all.

summary.description: Counts by status: needs_revision, underperforming, stale, healthy

evaluations.description: Per-template health evaluations with metrics and issues

revision_suggestions.description: AI revision suggestions for flagged templates

post.summary: Run the listing-as-BD pipeline for a listing entity. Finds matching contacts (same asset type/state + geographic proximity) and queues draft candidates for review.

listing_entity_id.description: The listing entity to run BD matching against

exclude_entity_ids.description: Entity IDs to exclude (e.g., the seller)

post.summary: Generate a document (BOV, comp package, report) using AI-assembled context.
Create a Microsoft To Do task linked to an LCC action item.
Get merge guidance for two potentially duplicate entities — shows what would be combined.
Trigger ingestion of flagged Outlook emails into the inbox queue.
Triage an inbox item — change status, set priority, assign.
Promote an inbox item to a shared team action item.
Create a follow-up action item for a listing pursuit.
Update the status of an action item in the execution queue.
Close a research task and optionally create a follow-up action item.
Reassign a work item (action, inbox, or research task) to a different team member.
Escalate an action item to a manager with a reason. Requires manager-level approval.

contacts.description: Hot lead contacts with activity context

context.description: Relationship context with history and recommendations

data.description: Data payload to render into the card

limit.description: Number of top contacts to include (default 10)

response.description: AI-generated call sheet with prep notes

contact_id.description: Contact unified_id from GOV contacts DB

contact_name.description: Contact name (used if contact_id not available)

intent.description: Purpose of the outreach (e.g., "reconnect", "listing pitch", "market update")

tone.description: Desired tone (default: professional, warm, and concise)

context.description: Merged context payload with contact, property, listing data

strict.description: Fail if mandatory variables are missing

draft.description: Rendered draft with subject, body, variable resolution status

shared_context.description: Shared listing/property context merged with each contact

template_id.description: Filter to a specific template ID (e.g., T-003). Omit for all templates.

avg_edit_distance_pct.description: 0=no edits, 100=completely rewritten. High values suggest template needs revision.

template_id.description: Evaluate a specific template (e.g., T-001). Omit for all.

summary.description: Counts by status: needs_revision, underperforming, stale, healthy

evaluations.description: Per-template health evaluations with metrics and issues

revision_suggestions.description: AI revision suggestions for flagged templates

listing_entity_id.description: The listing entity to run BD matching against

exclude_entity_ids.description: Entity IDs to exclude (e.g., the seller)

apiKey.name: X-LCC-Key
apiKey.description: LCC API key for Power Automate / Copilot
